framework.name: Chain Verifiability Breaks at Weakest Link
framework.description: A single unverifiable agent in a delegation chain breaks end-to-end behavioral verification for ALL downstream nodes. This directly addresses the multi-hop delegation problem — OAuth composition doesn't solve it because verification is a chain property, not a node property.
framework.raw_quote: a single unverifiable interior agent breaks end-to-end behavioral verification for all downstream nodes, yielding principled deployment constraints on model placement in trust trees

source.title: Cryptographic Binding and Reproducibility Verification for AI Agent ...
